Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is ready to begin on time when called
Evidence To Observe: Demo starts without delay beyond allocated transition/setup

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Demo environment is operational at start
Evidence To Observe: App loads and is usable before scripted steps begin

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Seed data includes multiple jobs spanning stages
Evidence To Observe: At least a few jobs exist across different stages

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Seed data includes completed Sprint 1 profile baseline
Evidence To Observe: Identity/contact + summary are already populated

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Search works across jobs
Evidence To Observe: Search by title/company/keywords returns expected results

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Filter and sort work on the dashboard
Evidence To Observe: Filter and sort each change visible results

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Stage/status indicators are visible on job cards
Evidence To Observe: Job cards clearly show current stage cues

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Job card opens into a consistent job detail view
Evidence To Observe: Card expansion takes user to the same detailed workflow pattern

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Job detail overview is editable
Evidence To Observe: Core job fields can be edited in detail view

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Dashboard/job workflow updates persist after refresh
Evidence To Observe: Updated job remains after reload/navigation

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Stage transition works for valid forward move
Evidence To Observe: Team demonstrates a legal stage change

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Invalid stage transition is blocked with clear feedback (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Team shows a blocked transition and warning/confirmation behavior

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Timeline reflects stage changes and activity entries
Evidence To Observe: Timeline updates after stage/activity changes

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Interview entries can be added with round/date/notes
Evidence To Observe: Interview data is stored and visible

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Follow-up/reminder tracking works
Evidence To Observe: Follow-up item is created and visible for the job

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Outcome tracking works
Evidence To Observe: User can record or update outcome state

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile sections beyond Sprint 1 are present
Evidence To Observe: Experience, Education, Skills, and Preferences are visible

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile validation failure shows clear field-level feedback (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Example invalid entry is rejected with useful error text

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Duplicate skill prevention works (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Duplicate skill entry is blocked

Checklist Item (Yes/No): AI resume draft can be generated from profile + job context
Evidence To Observe: Draft is produced from the current job detail

Checklist Item (Yes/No): AI cover letter draft can be generated and rewritten
Evidence To Observe: Draft is created and at least one improve action is shown

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Generated output can be saved back into job context
Evidence To Observe: AI draft is saved and linked to the job

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team opens GitHub Actions and shows latest relevant workflow run
Evidence To Observe: Actions page is shown live with recent run context

Checklist Item (Yes/No): GitHub Actions evidence shows build + unit test execution
Evidence To Observe: Workflow details clearly include build/test jobs

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is prepared to show at least three negative unit tests and explain each
Evidence To Observe: Three negative tests are shown and briefly explained
